title: Verification & Failure Modes
learningObjectives: Explain why external, harness-side verification is required and identify three categories of model self-report that cannot be trusted.
Implement the evaluate → revise → verify loop, applying a multi-round rubric and stopping at a configurable PASS threshold.
Compute a weighted Wiggum score across five dimensions and derive the composite score formula that combines first-pass quality with hard criteria.
Classify a given agent failure into the taxonomy (task drift, placeholder generation, role ambiguity, encoding corruption) and prescribe a harness-side countermeasure.
Describe how a 3-persona parallel evaluation panel differs from single-evaluator Wiggum and when each is appropriate.
